llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V, covering about 97.43 decades.

At matched |V| values, |I| is close on both polarities, for example 6 V gives 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V and 2.2494143112878067e-05 A at +6 V, while 1 V gives 6.6186841031785665e-15 A at -1 V and 7.82976992891886e-15 A at +1 V.
Despite the overall rise, adjacent points show reversals, such as on the positive side from 5.45 V to 5.55 V where |I| changes from 1.8563767293971126e-05 A to 1.2995820311170867e-05 A.
ln(|I|/V^2) changes from about -230.6297029 at +0.1 V to -32.48084327 at +1.0 V and to -14.28577453 at +6.0 V, showing an overall increase with |V|.
